title: Vanilla Enhanced
description: Vanilla, but with more quality-of-life features that fit into the game. Including new biomes, new & revamped structures, and much more without bloating your game with unneeded content.
body:
Minecraft, but with better performance & more quality of life features.
Vanilla Enhanced adds content that could fit seamlessly into the vanilla game.

Some of the new features are listed below!

- **Better Performance**
[Sodium, Lithium, Nvidium & More!]

- **Shader Compatability**
[Iris!]
  
- **QoL Features**
[Better Third Person, Crawl, Dynamic Crosshair, EMI & More!]

- **New & Revamped Structures**
[Stronghold, Ancient City, Jungle Temples & More!]

- **Completelty Overhauled Terrain Gen**
[Terralith + Tectonic!]

- **Atmospheric Audio**
[Charmonium!]

- **Revamped Ender Dragon Fight**
[True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul!]

You can check the dependancies for the full mod list!

This modpack is relatively new, and is still being worked on. If you encounter any issues or bugs, please report them within the bug reporting [form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScwUAKLZ9Ub7j1yzd7f03OKFwRu7UVl7roG7qVTlohz57cGHQ/viewform?usp=sf_link).

_**Attributions!**_

Waddles [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waddles]

This modpack was built upon the "Fabulously Optimized" modpack.
https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized
